bluetooth_confirm.title: Confirm Device
bluetooth_confirm.description: To configure {name}, first put the device into pairing mode, then press Submit (Confirm).

select_model.title: Select Device Model
select_model.description: If the Bluetooth advertisement name includes a known code (for example **HEM-7600T**), it is selected by default—confirm or change it. Otherwise choose the model printed on the cuff or in Omron Connect. The list has **{model_total}** entries: **{profile_count}** hardware profiles plus **{variant_count}** regional or bundle codes that share a profile. If your exact code is missing, pick the closest model; wrong EEPROM layouts show up as empty or bad readings—check the log for **profile=** lines.

user_aliases.title: User names on the cuff
user_aliases.description: This model stores **{num_users}** user profiles. Enter a short name for each (defaults: user1, user2, …). These names appear in sensor names and entity IDs instead of generic user numbers.

pairing.title: Pair {model}
pairing.description: Submit (Confirm) will start pairing from Home Assistant. First put the cuff in pairing mode—for most models, hold the Bluetooth button until **-P-** appears—then press Submit.

pairing_os.title: Pair {model}
pairing_os.description: Submit (Confirm) will start pairing from Home Assistant. First set the device to pairing or discoverable mode as in the manual, then press Submit.

error.pairing_failed: Pairing failed. Make sure the device is in pairing mode (-P- on display) and try again.
error.decryption_failed: The provided bindkey did not work, sensor data could not be decrypted. Please check it and try again.
error.duplicate_user_aliases: Each user slot must have a different name (case-insensitive).

init.title: Omron Bluetooth
init.description:
How often Home Assistant should poll the blood pressure monitor for new readings (60–86400 seconds). Lower values use more battery on the cuff.

**Profile slots on this device:** {num_users}. When there is more than one, set a display name per slot below (defaults user1, user2, …). Renaming a slot creates new sensor entities for that slot.

error.duplicate_user_aliases: Each user slot must have a different name (case-insensitive).

device_alias.name: Device nickname
device_alias.description: Optional note only; does not rename the device or change any IDs.
